title: V1Webhook
description: Hatchet V1Webhook entity, derived from the Hatchet OpenAPI spec.

id.description: the id of this resource, in UUID format

createdAt.description: the time that this resource was created

updatedAt.description: the time that this resource was last updated

tenantId.description: The ID of the tenant associated with this webhook.

sourceName.description: The name of the source for this webhook

eventKeyExpression.description: The CEL expression to use for the event key. This is used to create the event key from the webhook payload.

scopeExpression.description: The CEL expression to use for the scope. This is used to filter the correct workflow to trigger.

staticPayload.description: The static payload to use for the webhook. This is used to send a static payload with the webhook.

authType.description: The type of authentication to use for the webhook

returnEventAsResponsePayload.description: Whether to return the triggered event as the response payload when this webhook is triggered
